prompt: Record per-candidate model endpoint attempts for a Cursor adapter run so benchmark rows can distinguish candidate model provenance from global routing defaults. Do not include a finished patch in the prompt.
expected_evidence: Candidate records include endpoint or model ids.
Route observation metadata is recorded per candidate.
Global model registry defaults are not treated as candidate provenance.
contamination_notes: Synthetic dirty-dozen harness task; contains no customer data, benchmark answer, or patch solution.
